function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"technology_choices": [{"category": "language", "choice": "Python", "rationale": "Existing Python service"}], "component_boundaries": [{"name": "feature-a", "responsibility": "Feature A behavior", "dependencies": [], "implementation_files": ["src/a/feature_a.py"], "capabilities": ["feature-a"]}, {"name": "feature-b", "responsibility": "Feature B behavior", "dependencies": ["feature-a"], "implementation_files": ["src/b/feature_b.py"], "capabilities": ["feature-b"]}], "data_flow": "Each feature registers into the shared core driver and is invoked independently.", "decisions": [{"id": "ARCH-001", "title": "Per-feature packages", "decision": "Feature A under src/a, feature B under src/b", "rationale": "Independently testable feature packages"}], "actors": [{"name": "End User", "type": "human", "triggers": ["invokes a feature"]}], "integrations": [{"name": "Core Driver", "direction": "inbound", "protocol": "filesystem"}], "test_surface": {"integration_flows": [{"name": "feature-registration-flow", "components_involved": ["feature-a", "feature-b"], "description": "Both features register through the core driver"}], "e2e_flows": [{"actor": "End User", "steps": ["invoke a feature"], "success_criteria": ["feature responds"]}]}, "upstream_resolutions": [], "harness_profiles": []}
